headline: CVS, FTC reach proposed settlement in insulin pricing case
summary: A settlement between CVS' pharmacy benefit manager and antitrust regulators would leave UnitedHealth as the sole holdout in high-profile suit.

raw.headline: CVS, FTC reach proposed settlement in insulin pricing case

headline: Is It Worth Investing in UnitedHealth (UNH) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in UnitedHealth (UNH). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Andrew Harris Joins Red Sky Health as Senior Vice President of Operations
summary: Red Sky Health, providers of an AI-driven platform that delivers healthcare claim denials remediation, today announced that recognized healthcare analytics leader, Andrew Harris, has joined the company as Senior Vice President of Operations. In this role, Harris will be responsible for scaling delivery, sharpening execution, and ensuring Red Sky Health continues to bring measurable, repeatable impact to every provider and partner they serve. headline: DOJ Antitrust Probe Puts Focus On UnitedHealth Valuation And Integrated Model
summary: The US Department of Justice has intensified an antitrust investigation into UnitedHealth Group's Optum subsidiary and its insurance division. The probe focuses on how the relationship between Optum and the insurance arm may affect competition across healthcare services and insurance markets. This heightened scrutiny introduces additional headline and regulatory risk beyond typical earnings or valuation debates for NYSE:UNH. For investors watching NYSE:UNH, the timing of this DOJ escalation...
